name: q5m
description: A modern TypeScript library for quantum computing simulations

scripts.build: npm run clean && npm run build:types && npm run build:js
scripts.build:core: npm run clean && npm run build:types && npm run build:js && echo 'Core build (~50KB): dist/q5m.core.js'
scripts.test:e2e: npm run setup:e2e && cypress run --env framework=none
scripts.test:e2e:headless: npm run setup:e2e && cypress run --env framework=none
scripts.test:e2e:vanilla: npm run setup:e2e && cypress run --env framework=vanilla
scripts.test:e2e:react: npm run setup:e2e && cypress run --env framework=react
scripts.test:e2e:vue: npm run setup:e2e && cypress run --env framework=vue
scripts.test:e2e:angular: npm run setup:e2e && cypress run --env framework=angular
scripts.test:e2e:nextjs: npm run setup:e2e && cypress run --env framework=nextjs
scripts.test:e2e:nuxtjs: npm run setup:e2e && cypress run --env framework=nuxtjs
scripts.test:e2e:frameworks: npm run setup:e2e && cypress run --env framework=frameworks
scripts.test:e2e:all: npm run setup:e2e && cypress run --env framework=all
scripts.test:e2e:sequential: npm run test:e2e:vanilla && npm run test:e2e:react && npm run test:e2e:vue && npm run test:e2e:angular && npm run test:e2e:nextjs && npm run test:e2e:nuxtjs
scripts.check-all: npm run format:check && npm run typecheck && npm run lint && npm run test && npm run test:e2e:all
scripts.fix-all: npm run lint:fix && npm run format
scripts.docs:build: npm run typecheck && npm run docs
scripts.docs:validate: npm run docs && echo 'Documentation validation complete'
scripts.docs:full: npm run clean && npm run build:types && npm run docs && npm run docs:serve
scripts.size: npm run build && ls -lah dist/*.js dist/*.mjs | grep -v map

author: OpenQL Project
